stages.native:
WITH key_people AS (
  SELECT lower(trim(m."First name")) AS first_key,
         lower(trim(m."Last name")) AS last_key,
         bool_or(m."Status" = 'Active' AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid','Part Paid')) AS holds_key,
         bool_or(m."Status" <> 'Active' OR m."Payment" = 'Not Paid') AS unresolved
  FROM raw_members m
  JOIN membership_packages p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  WHERE p.category = 'Pavilion Key'
    AND coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
  GROUP BY 1,2
), stock AS (
  SELECT
    coalesce(max(CASE WHEN key = 'keys_stock_opening' THEN value END), '42')::bigint AS opening_stock,
    coalesce(max(CASE WHEN key = 'keys_stock_baseline_completed_batch_id' THEN value END), '0')::bigint AS baseline_batch_id
  FROM public.global_settings
), issued AS (
  SELECT coalesce(sum(s.key_tags), 0)::bigint AS issued_keys
  FROM public.signup_batches b
  LEFT JOIN public.vw_signup_batches_summary s ON s.batch_id = b.id
  CROSS JOIN stock
  WHERE b.status = $$Complete$$
    AND b.id > stock.baseline_batch_id
), summary AS (
  SELECT 1 AS ord,
         'How many people currently hold keys?' AS question,
         count(*) FILTER (WHERE holds_key)::bigint AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1616'::text AS detail_url
  FROM key_people
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 2 AS ord,
         'How many key-related cases are we dealing with?' AS question,
         count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT holds_key AND unresolved)::bigint AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1617'::text AS detail_url
  FROM key_people
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3 AS ord,
         'Issued since stock baseline 30/3/2026' AS question,
         issued_keys AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1619'::text AS detail_url
  FROM issued
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4 AS ord,
         'Keys in stock' AS question,
         (SELECT opening_stock FROM stock) - issued_keys AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1619'::text AS detail_url
  FROM issued
)
SELECT question AS "Question",
       count AS "Count",
       detail_url
FROM summary
ORDER BY ord;
